output.cover_letter:
17 July 2026

Hiring Team
replit
Re: Enterprise Product Manager

Dear Hiring Team at replit,

My background as an I am a direct match for the Enterprise Product Manager role at replit. I have led enterprise platform modernisations and AI/ML solutions in regulated financial environments, directly matching Replit's need to build enterprise-grade identity, governance, and compliance capabilities for large-scale adoption.

Your job description calls for fluency with IT and admin buyer personas and the capabilities they need to adopt software at scale—SSO, SCIM, governance, and data privacy. At ANZ, I directed a $5M+ program portfolio modernising core banking platforms to cloud-native architecture, ensuring 100% compliance with enterprise architectural standards and risk models. I also led the technical delivery of real-time WebSocket telemetry servers handling 10k+ concurrent devices, reducing P95 latency to under 200 ms, demonstrating the kind of technical judgment and infrastructure depth required to build Replit's enterprise platform. Additionally, at the Australian Taxation Office, I architected a COBOL/mainframe test-automation harness that cut evidence effort by ~92% across 200+ scenarios, showing I can drive measurable efficiency gains in complex, regulated environments.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience building enterprise platforms and AI solutions in regulated settings can help Replit turn its early enterprise traction into a company-wide standard. I am available for a call at your convenience next week to walk through specific approaches to identity, governance, and land-and-expand motions.

Sincerely,
Administrator

output.cover_letter:
17 July 2026

Hiring Team
decagon
Re: Senior Agent Product Manager - Sydney

Dear Hiring Team at decagon,

My background in end-to-end delivery leadership is a direct match for the Senior Agent Product Manager - Sydney role at decagon. My 15+ years bridging executive strategy with hands-on technical delivery — including architecting AI/ML solutions and owning end-to-end outcomes for multi-million-dollar programs — directly maps to your need for a Senior Agent Product Manager who can earn C-suite trust while building the working AI agent.

The role calls for someone who can own the technical win on strategic opportunities, partnering with Sales and Forward-deployed engineers to build working AI agents that convert skeptical buyers. At ANZ, I led the technical delivery of AI solutions including a real-time WebSocket telemetry server handling 10k+ concurrent devices, reducing P95 latency to under 200 ms, while directing a program portfolio valued at over $5M across 5+ cross-functional squads. You also need a leader who can design, build, and optimize enterprise-grade AI agents in production by going deep on customer workflows. My recent independent work involved standing up an end-to-end Langfuse and Phoenix evaluation stack to score hallucination, latency, and cost across high-volume daily LLM generations, which reduced simulated error budget breaches by 38%. Additionally, the requirement to turn frameworks into reusable assets that scale across accounts resonates with my experience at the Australian Taxation Office, where I architected a COBOL/mainframe test-automation harness covering 200+ SIT/E2E scenarios across eight squads, cutting evidence effort by approximately 92% — a playbook I authored and handed off for program-wide adoption. My career has consistently depended on tight collaboration with engineering, strategy, and executive stakeholders to deliver measurable outcomes.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience owning complex technical delivery and building AI solutions can contribute to Decagon's largest enterprise deployments. I am available for a conversation at your convenience and can adapt my schedule to accommodate your team's timing.

Sincerely,
Administrator
